contact.hqSubtitle: Connecting industrial leaders with mission-critical intelligence.
contact.clustersDesc: EMEA, APAC, and North American distribution protocols active.

legal.securityDesc: The architectural blueprint governing data integrity, cryptographic sovereignty, and mission-critical safety across the KGMAO matrix.
legal.blueprintDesc: Full forensic architecture documentation available for Enterprise Tier partners.

encryption.title: Encryption Matrix
encryption.desc: All telemetry and diagnostic traffic is secured via end-to-end AES-256-GCM encryption layers, ensuring data integrity across global clusters.

zeroKnowledge.title: Zero-Knowledge Storage
zeroKnowledge.desc: KGMAO engineers do not have raw access to tenant data. All operational logs are hashed and stored in immutable ledger nodes.

identity.title: Identity Sovereignty
identity.desc: GDPR-compliant identity management. We utilize biometric hashes and multi-factor authentication for mission-critical authorization.

iso.title: ISO-27001 Certified
iso.desc: Our infrastructure adheres to international security standards, with quarterly forensic audits and real-time threat detection.

s1.title: 01. Handshake Cryptographique
s1.desc: Chaque appareil se connectant au KGMAO IoT Edge doit subir un handshake cryptographique en plusieurs étapes. Les clés RSA-4096 sont renouvelées toutes les 24 heures de fonctionnement pour empêcher les attaques par rejoue sur la télémétrie des capteurs.

s2.title: 02. Clôture de Données Géographiques
s2.desc: La souveraineté est maintenue grâce à l'isolation des clusters régionaux. Les données générées dans les nœuds EMEA restent dans les clusters de juridiction européens, sauf si elles sont explicitement reliées via une autorisation admin multi-signature.

s3.title: 03. Protocole de Réponse aux Incidents
s3.desc: En cas d'anomalie détectée, le moteur IA de KGMAO déclenche automatiquement une 'Quarantaine de Cluster'. Les nœuds suspects sont isolés du lien neural jusqu'à ce qu'une autorisation forensique soit accordée par notre équipe de sécurité.

s1.title: 01. Cryptographic Handshake
s1.desc: Every device connecting to the KGMAO IoT Edge must undergo a multi-stage cryptographic handshake. RSA-4096 keys are rotated every 24 operating hours to prevent replay attacks on sensor telemetry.

s2.title: 02. Geographic Data Fencing
s2.desc: Sovereignty is maintained through regional cluster isolation. Data generated in EMEA nodes stays within European jurisdiction clusters unless explicitly bridged via multi-signature admin authorization.

s3.title: 03. Incident Response Protocol
s3.desc: In the event of a detected anomaly, the KGMAO AI Engine automatically triggers a 'Cluster Quarantine'. Suspicious nodes are isolated from the neural link until forensic clearance is granted by our security team.

legal.slaSubtitle: The KGMAO Guarantee: Mission-critical industrial uptime backed by redundant infrastructure and forensic response protocols.

c1.title: 1. Performance Guarantee
c1.desc: KGMAO guarantees an annual uptime percentage of at least 99.98% for all core SaaS modules, including Asset Monitoring, IoT Twin synchronization, and Predictive Forensics. Our global distribution ensures that even under massive regional stress, your local node remains synchronized.

c2.title: 2. Data Availability Flux
c2.desc: Telemetry data is triple-replicated across geographic clusters. In the event of a cluster failure, our 'Omega Sync' protocol automatically routes traffic to the nearest secondary node within 400ms, ensuring non-stop industrial intelligence.

credits.title: SLA Credits
credits.desc: If we fail to meet our uptime guarantee, your account is credited with 'Industrial Resilience Credits' automatically applied to your next billing cycle.

privacy.subtitle: Documenting the forensic management of industrial data and personnel identity security within the KGMAO matrix.

encryption.title: Encryption Core
encryption.desc: End-to-end AES-256 encryption for all telemetry and diagnostic traffic across regional hubs.

zeroVision.title: Zero Vision
zeroVision.desc: Our engineers never view raw operational logs without explicit multi-signature tenant consent.

identity.title: Identity Capture Protocols
identity.p1: We collect minimal professional identity data (Deep Identity) required for mission-critical authentication. This includes corporate email identifiers, biometric hashes (optional for safety permits), and geographic access logs.
identity.p2: We do not aggregate personal behavioral data for advertising or 3rd party commoditization. Your privacy is a fundamental parameter of our industrial stability.

telemetry.title: Telemetry Retention
telemetry.p1: Industrial sensor data is retained based on your enterprise tier's archiving policy (typically 7 to 25 years). Forensic audit logs are stored in immutable blockchain ledger nodes to ensure non-repudiation of safety events.
telemetry.p2: Data transmission across international borders is governed by the specific subscription tier and regional cluster selected during onboarding.

privacy.footer: KGMAO PRIVACY PROTOCOL © 2026. DATA SOVEREIGNTY SECURED.

terms.frameworkDesc: Legal framework governed by high-court industrial protocols.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Protocols
acceptance.p1: By initializing a session on the KGMAO platform, you explicitly agree to adhere to these governance protocols. Our system is an enterprise-grade industrial suite; use without explicit authorization or beyond the defined operational scope is strictly prohibited.
acceptance.p2: These terms constitute a legally binding agreement between your Enterprise Entity and Kalide Global Industrial Suite.

sovereignty.title: Data Sovereignty
sovereignty.p1: All telemetry data, asset snapshots, and diagnostic reports remains the metadata property of the respective tenant. However, KGMAO retains a non-exclusive license to process such data for predictive algorithm training and forensic stabilization of the overall matrix.
sovereignty.p2: Data transmission across international borders is governed by the specific subscription tier and regional cluster selected during onboarding.

ip.title: Intellectual Property Matrix
ip.p1: The KGMAO source core, UI/UX aesthetics, and proprietary diagnostic models are the sole intellectual property of Kalide Global. Any attempt to reverse-engineer, decompile, or bypass the security encryption layers will trigger an immediate termination sequence and legal investigation.

sla.subtitle: The KGMAO Guarantee: Mission-critical industrial uptime backed by redundant infrastructure and forensic response protocols.

c1.desc: KGMAO guarantees an annual uptime percentage of at least 99.98% for all core SaaS modules, including Asset Monitoring, IoT Twin synchronization, and Predictive Forensics. Our global distribution ensures that even under massive regional stress, your local node remains synchronized.

c2.title: 2. Data Availability Flux
